plugins.name: bananabay-watchdog
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that writes liveness heartbeats for claude-code-watchdog

plugins.name: invite-friend
plugins.description: Telegram-driven invitation flow for 香蕉先生 — registers invites, sends the first message, schedules hourly auto-follow-ups, classifies friend replies, and maintains the contacts/aliases store. Migrated from Openclaw so Claude drives the same ~/bin/invite-cli and state files.
